name: thoth
description: Cross-agent workflows for maintainability, measured performance engineering, and documentation cleanup.

interface.longDescription: Audit and resolve maintainability debt, measure and optimize performance with reproducible evidence, and remove noisy code comments through workflows shared by Claude Code and Codex.
defaultPrompt: Audit the most relevant area for maintainability issues.
Measure the most relevant performance hotspot and track verified findings.
Clean redundant comments from files changed in this session.
